_comment: Class B external client (issue #227): a non-TAPPaaS device (Synology, TrueNAS, MacBook, ...) that PUSHES backups into an isolated namespace. Copy to /home/tappaas/config/external-<name>.json, edit, then: backup-manage.sh add-external <name>. The client authenticates as <name>@pbs (DatastoreBackup role = write, no delete). Client-side encryption is the client's responsibility.
name: synology
